---

## 🐛 Bug Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is -->

## 📍 Location
<!-- Where in the app did this occur? -->
- **Page/Feature:** 
- **URL Path:** [e.g., /project/5, /assembly-builder, /login]
- **Route:** [e.g., GET /project/<id>, POST /ai/chat]

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
<!-- How can we reproduce this bug? -->
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Enter/select '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
<!-- What should happen instead? -->

## ❌ Actual Behavior
<!-- What actually happened? -->

## 🖼️ Screenshots / Console Errors
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or paste browser console errors -->
```
Paste any JavaScript console errors here
```

## 💻 Environment
<!-- Please complete the following information -->
- **Browser:** [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox, Safari]
- **OS:** [e.g. Windows 11, macOS, Ubuntu]
- **Screen Size:** [e.g. Desktop 1920x1080, Laptop 1366x768]
- **Environment:** [e.g., Local dev, Production zenbid.io]

## 🔥 Severity
<!-- How critical is this bug? -->
- [ ] 🔴 **Critical** - Blocks core functionality, data loss risk, site down
- [ ] 🟡 **High** - Important feature broken but has workaround
- [ ] 🟢 **Medium** - Annoying but non-blocking, cosmetic with functional impact
- [ ] 🔵 **Low** - Polish/cosmetic only, no functional impact

## 🔐 Auth/Tenant Context
<!-- If relevant -->
- **Logged in as:** [admin / estimator / viewer]
- **Company ID:** [if known]
- **Multi-tenant issue?** [Does it affect data isolation?]

## 📝 Additional Context
<!-- Any other context about the problem -->
- Related to recent deployment? [Session 12 changes?]
- Happens consistently or intermittently?
- Only on specific projects/assemblies?

## 🔧 Workaround
<!-- If you found a temporary solution, describe it here -->

## 🎯 Related Routes/Models
<!-- If you know which parts of the codebase are involved -->
- **Model:** [e.g., Project, Assembly, LineItem, User]
- **Route:** [e.g., /ai/chat, /project/<id>/update]
- **Template:** [e.g., project.html, agentx_panel.html]
